senses.gloss: Zechariah, Zacharias, Zachary (father of John the Baptist), considered a prophet in Islam.

examples.english: ˹This is˺ a reminder of your Lord’s mercy to His servant Zachariah,

senses.gloss: a male given name, equivalent to English Zachary

etymology.text: From Classical Syriac ܙܟ݂ܼܿܪܝܵܐ (z'ḵaryāʾ), from Hebrew זְכַרְיָה (zkharyá).
